title: Faculty of Dentistry Research and Development
content:
Faculty of Dentistry Research and Development

1. Research Strategies and Goals

The strategies and goals of our faculty is compatible with 2019-2023 strategic plan of our University.

Research Strategies of Our Faculty:

To produce information, to disseminate information and to increase effectiveness of usage for the society by making information applicable

To increase research sources and effectiveness

To strengthen the culture of science, research, creativity and innovation

Research Goals of our Faculty

To make science, creativity and innovation visible

To reinforce infrastructure of research and to diversify resources.

To improve structures and progress which encourage and provide conditions and facilities for research

To share research results with public via popular publications and mass communication devices besides academic publications

To turn research outcomes into resource

To encourage to research in program curriculums

To make research visible within both university and external stakeholders

To provide internal and external stakeholder share during establishing research outcomes

2.

Research Resources

According to our university 2019-2023 Strategic Plan, R&D, PARGE

(Project, Research, Application, Training and Development). and Research and Application Centers provide financial resources and physical infrastructure for research and development activities.

3.

Monitoring and Improvement of Research Performance

Research activities of our faculty is monitored by Activity Monitoring System (AMS) (

). (

Policies and goal definitions on performance improvement; and, implementation, control and measurements on the subject are in the stage of planning.
